tips_en: If you are new to multimodal AI, start with the DiNA paper (Paper 3) as it provides foundational insights into unified token representation for vision, audio, and language under a single autoregressive framework, which underpins many recent advances. The Unify-Agent paper (Paper 1) represents a practical application of agentic reasoning for knowledge-intensive image synthesis and builds upon the unified MLLM architectures mentioned in Paper 3. Notably, both Paper 1 and Paper 3 share a common theme of unified multimodal architectures, while CARLA-Air (Paper 2) extends this concept to embodied intelligence simulation but serves a different research community.
tips_zh: 如果你是多模态AI领域的新手，建议先阅读DiNA论文（第三篇），因为它为视觉、音频和语言在单一自回归框架下的统一token表示提供了基础性见解，这一架构支撑了许多最新进展。Unify-Agent论文（第一篇）则代表了代理推理在知识密集型图像合成中的实际应用，基于第三篇中提到的统一MLLM架构。值得注意的是，第一篇和第三篇的共同主题是统一的多模态架构，而CARLA-Air（第二篇）则将这一概念扩展到具身智能仿真领域，但服务于不同的研究社区。
